JSON Formatter Pro

Source

Accessibility Statement

JSON Formatter Pro is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities.

Commitment to Accessibility

We are committed to providing an accessible web experience for all users, regardless of their abilities. We continuously work to improve the accessibility of JSON Formatter Pro to conform to WCAG 2.2 Level AA standards.

Accessibility Features

🎹 Keyboard Navigation

  • Full keyboard navigation throughout the entire application
  • Logical tab order for all interactive elements
  • Skip-to-editor link to bypass repetitive elements
  • Keyboard shortcuts available via command palette (Ctrl/Cmd + K)
  • All functionality accessible without a mouse

👁️ Vision

  • High Contrast Themes: Light and dark modes with sufficient color contrast (WCAG AA compliant)
  • Color Contrast: Text-to-background contrast ratio ≥ 4.5:1 for normal text
  • Focus Indicators: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements
  • Resizable Text: Text can be resized without loss of functionality (up to 200%)
  • No Flashing: No content flashes more than 3 times per second

🔊 Screen Reader Support

  • Semantic HTML markup for proper structure
  • ARIA labels and descriptions for interactive elements
  • ARIA live regions for status updates and error messages
  • Proper heading hierarchy (H1, H2, H3, etc.)
  • Alternative text for all icons and images
  • Form labels associated with inputs

🎬 Motion & Animation

  • Respects `prefers-reduced-motion`: Animations are disabled for users who prefer reduced motion
  • No Auto-Play: No automatically playing audio or video content
  • Minimal Animation: Subtle transitions that don't distract

📱 Responsive Design

  • Fully responsive on mobile, tablet, and desktop devices
  • Touch targets at least 44×44 CSS pixels
  • Readable on all device sizes without horizontal scrolling

🌐 Additional Support

  • Clear and simple language throughout
  • Consistent navigation and layout
  • Error messages with clear, actionable suggestions
  • No time limits for interaction with the tool
  • Works with browser zoom and text resizing

Accessibility Testing

JSON Formatter Pro is regularly tested for accessibility compliance using:

  • Automated accessibility scanners (axe, WAVE)
  • Manual keyboard navigation testing
  • Screen reader testing (NVDA, JAWS, VoiceOver)
  • Color contrast verification
  • WCAG 2.2 compliance audits

Known Limitations

While we strive for full accessibility, some areas may have limitations:

  • The JSON editor (CodeMirror) may have complex keyboard interactions for advanced users
  • Very large JSON files (50+ MB) may have performance impacts on some devices
  • Some color combinations in exported code blocks may not meet perfect contrast ratios

Assistive Technology Compatibility

JSON Formatter Pro is tested and compatible with:

  • Screen Readers: NVDA, JAWS, VoiceOver (Mac/iOS), Narrator (Windows), TalkBack (Android)
  • Browser Extensions: Password managers, ad blockers, accessibility extensions
  • OS Features: Windows High Contrast Mode, macOS accessibility features, mobile accessibility features

Standards & Guidelines

JSON Formatter Pro aims to comply with:

  • WCAG 2.2 Level AA: Web Content Accessibility Guidelines 2.2
  • ADA: Americans with Disabilities Act
  • AODA: Accessibility for Ontarians with Disabilities Act
  • EN 301 549: European accessibility standard

Feedback & Accessibility Issues

We welcome accessibility feedback. If you encounter any accessibility barriers while using JSON Formatter Pro, please:

  • Email us at hashcode.dev@gmail.com
  • Contact us with details about the issue
  • Open a GitHub issue

Please include:

  • Description of the accessibility barrier
  • The browser and assistive technology you're using
  • Steps to reproduce the issue
  • How the issue impacts your ability to use the tool

Third-Party Content

JSON Formatter Pro may include third-party content (e.g., ads) that we don't control. We make reasonable efforts to ensure third-party content is also accessible, but we recommend reporting any accessibility issues with ads or external content.

Continuous Improvement

Accessibility is an ongoing commitment. We continuously work to:

  • Improve accessibility of existing features
  • Test new features for accessibility before release
  • Stay updated with WCAG guidelines and best practices
  • Incorporate user feedback on accessibility
  • Train our team on accessibility best practices

Last Updated

This Accessibility Statement was last updated in July 2026. We review and update this statement regularly.

© 2026 JSON Formatter Pro. All rights reserved. Everything runs in your browser — no data is sent to a server.
